case_title: ECAST, INC. VS. NUVOSTUDIOS et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-24-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAY-10-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-24-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ECAST, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT NUVOSTUDIOS DOES 1 - 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAY-10-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-04-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       APR-12-2002
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR APR-02-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
BEFORE HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. (212)
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT NUVOSTUDIOS DOES 1 - 20
